summary: Frontend testing completed for new Welcome Screen and Admin Dashboard features. All 10 requested features verified and working correctly.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - frontend-only demo app with role selection
seed_data_creation: None - uses mocked data from mockData.js (SCHOOLS, TEACHER_STUDENTS)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Welcome screen at / has 5 role options. Admin dashboard at /admin has 3 tabs (Dashboard, Colegios, Usuarios). Key data-testid attributes: role-option-{student|teacher|parent|school|admin}, demo-enter-btn, admin-dashboard, admin-tab-{dashboard|schools|users}, admin-school-search, admin-user-search, admin-role-filter, impersonate-{student|teacher|parent|school}

welcome_screen_5_roles.details: Welcome screen shows 5 role options (Alumno, Profesor, Apoderado, Colegio, Administrador) with icons, labels, and descriptions

alumno_default_selection.details: Alumno is selected by default with cyan border (border-accent) and bg-accent/20 styling

radio_behavior.details: Clicking different role deselects previous one - only one can be selected at a time (radio behavior)

alumno_navigation.details: Selecting Alumno and clicking 'Ingresar' navigates to /inicio with student dashboard showing Sofia's profile

admin_navigation.details: Selecting Administrador and clicking 'Ingresar' navigates to /admin with admin dashboard

admin_stats_cards.details: Admin dashboard shows 4 metric cards: Total usuarios (7), Total colegios (5), Activos semana (38), Progreso promedio (71%)

admin_tabs.details: Three tabs (Dashboard, Colegios, Usuarios) switch content correctly

schools_search_accent_insensitive.details: Colegios tab search for 'verbo' correctly filters to show only 'Colegio Verbo Divino' - accent-insensitive normalization working

users_role_filter.details: Usuarios tab role filter for 'Alumnos' reduces user list from 12 to 5 (only students shown)

impersonation_student.details: Clicking 'Entrar como Alumno' navigates to /inicio with student dashboard

impersonation_teacher.details: Clicking 'Entrar como Profesor' navigates to /teacher with teacher panel

profesor_from_welcome.details: Selecting Profesor from welcome screen navigates to /teacher

colegio_from_welcome.details: Selecting Colegio from welcome screen navigates to /school with school dashboard showing 'Colegio San Ignacio'
